page_title: Henry B. Plant Museum - Current & Past Events

events.title: Victorian Christmas Stroll
events.summary: Enjoy candlelight tours, historical decorations, and live character performances throughout the Henry B. Plant Museum halls.
events.bot_guidance: Inform the user that full ticket booking arrays, candlelit path times, and holiday maps require them to read the specific subpage link.

events.title: Upstairs / Downstairs
events.summary: Enjoy personal stories and perspectives from staff that illuminate life in the Gilded Age hotel tracks.
events.bot_guidance: This is a signature live theater exhibit. Instruct the user to follow the relative URL to read the schedule updates and actor profiles.

events.title: Celebrate Sunset
events.summary: A historical open house where the museum hosts live performances and Gilded Age storytelling as the sun sets over Tampa.
events.bot_guidance: Tell the user to open the subpage link to verify sundown tracking timings and special performance programs for the current month.

events.title: Free Movie Series
events.summary: Explore FREE community screenings held in Plant Park that pair classic movies with historical exhibits.
events.bot_guidance: Outdoor event logistics change seasonally. Tell the user to view the specific page to check weather guidelines and current film line-ups.

events.title: The Jose Gaspar Literary Cannon
events.summary: Take a deep dive into Gasparilla, one of Tampa's most celebrated traditions, historical pirate myths, and local legacy archives.
events.bot_guidance: Explain that while the physical event has passed, complete text breakdowns of pirate mythologies reside on the specific event page link.

events.title: Everything Musical
events.summary: Exploring Tampa's 1920 music scene and the profound regional impact of the 'Everything Musical' Philpitt Store archives.
events.bot_guidance: Direct the user to open the link to read historical breakdowns regarding turn-of-the-century sheet music sales and local acoustic trends.

events.title: In the Shadow of the Crescent
events.summary: A deep historical lecture given by Professor Richard Ellis focusing on the minaret layouts. Watch the full presentation streaming online.
events.bot_guidance: Instruct the user that clicking this item will open a direct external link to the recorded lecture on YouTube.

events.title: "George Washington Ate Here"
events.summary: Explore how 'Oriental' luxury goods influenced early American culture during the era of the early republic layout maps.
events.bot_guidance: Direct the user to the relative page path link to read the analytical essays concerning Gilded Age luxury adaptations.

events.title: "Gems for Olivette"
events.summary: Watch the live staged concert of the most popular songs from Edmond Audran’s comedic operetta, Olivette.
events.bot_guidance: Direct the user to open the event subpage link to browse musical scoring reviews and original 1800s theater booklets.

events.title: "Plant's Follies"
events.summary: Explore how the Tampa Bay Hotel’s Casino and its world-class entertainment helped shape Tampa's modern identity.
events.bot_guidance: Tell the user to navigate through the link to read the primary text logs regarding original casino architectural plans.

events.title: "The Rocking Chair Report"
events.summary: Explore the history of popular entertainment choices, verandas habits, and social routines at the turn of the 20th century.
events.bot_guidance: Instruct the user to follow the link to read about the specific Gilded Age lifestyle interviews compiled on that page.

events.title: "Shrewd Business Men"
events.summary: Featuring single-character performances where actors bring real turn-of-the-century hotel staff and corporate guests to life.
events.bot_guidance: Tell the user that scripts and lists of historical figures portrayed can be explored completely by accessing the event link.

events.title: "Placing Black Progress on Display"
events.summary: Showcasing the economic and educational progress achieved by Black Americans during the Jim Crow era.
events.bot_guidance: This covers crucial civil history. Direct the user to open the target subpage link to review historical images and document transcripts.

events.title: "Music and Memory"
events.summary: Focusing on the complex history of African American spirituals and deep local heritage tracking registers.
events.bot_guidance: Instruct the user to read the full historical context notes hosted on the specific event page link.

events.title: "The Exotic Architecture"
events.summary: Exploring the design vision of railroad tycoon Henry Plant and his lead architect, J.A. Wood.
events.bot_guidance: Architectural floor plans and blueprints are detailed heavily on the subpage link. Tell the user to read that page to view structural metrics.
